prompt: 你幫我看一下 reactor 有一個 patch 是 revert float 精度跑掉問題  你幫我把 patch 上到mini2 如果需要

input.command: cd /d/mybot/git/reactor-fw && git log --oneline --all -i --grep="float" --grep="precision" --grep="revert" --grep="精度" -30
input.description: Search reactor-fw git log for float/precision/revert commits

input.command: git show ba620c8 --stat && echo "=====FULL DIFF=====" && git show ba620c8
input.description: Show RAD-1476 float16 precision fix commit details

input.command: cd /d/mybot/git/spark-mini-ii-fw 2>/dev/null && echo "=== repo exists ===" && git log --oneline -1 || echo "NO REPO at spark-mini-ii-fw"; echo "---- find AudioProcessor ----"; find /d/mybot/git/spark-mini-ii-fw -iname "AudioProcessor*" 2>/dev/null
input.description: Check spark-mini-ii-fw repo and locate AudioProcessor

input.command: echo "=== RAD-1476 already present? ===" && grep -rn "RAD-1476\|1000.0f + 0.5f\|float16" Source/ 2>/dev/null | head; echo "=== symbols ==="; grep -n "DSP_IDX_REVERB_MODE\|FX_ID_REVERB\|set_dsp_module_param\|create_dsp_module" Source/Interfaces/AudioProcessor.cpp | head -40
input.description: Check mini2 for RAD-1476 fix and relevant symbols

input.command: cd /d/mybot/git/reactor-fw && echo "=== reactor: DSP_IDX_REVERB_MODE def ===" && grep -rn "DSP_IDX_REVERB_MODE" Appli/Source/ | head; echo; echo "=== reactor: float16 storage refs ===" && grep -rln "float16\|fp16\|half" Appli/Source/ 2>/dev/null | head
input.description: Find DSP_IDX_REVERB_MODE definition and float16 storage in reactor

input.command: cd /d/mybot/git/spark-mini-ii-fw && echo "=== mini2 AudioProcessor.h DSP_IDX enum ===" && grep -n "DSP_IDX\|REVERB_MODE\|enum" Source/Interfaces/AudioProcessor.h | head -40
input.description: Find DSP param index enum in mini2

input.command: echo "=== float16 storage in mini2 ===" && grep -rln "float16\|fp16\|__fp16\|half_" Source/ 2>/dev/null | head; echo; echo "=== reverb MODE decode (how value->mode) ==="; grep -rn "REVERB_MODE\|reverb.*mode\|mode.*reverb\|round\|0.5f\|0.05" Source/Interfaces/AudioProcessor.cpp | head -30
input.description: Check float16 storage and reverb mode decode in mini2

input.command: echo "===== mini2 create_dsp_module param apply loop (916-1010) =====" && sed -n '916,1012p' Source/Interfaces/AudioProcessor.cpp
input.description: Read mini2 create_dsp_module

input.command: echo "===== mini2 float16 in AudioService (preset storage) =====" && grep -n "float16\|fp16\|__fp16\|half\|f16" Source/Interfaces/AudioService.cpp | head -20; echo "===== WAH mode value defines / decode ====="; grep -rn "WAH_MODE\|wah.*mode\|DSP_IDX_WAH" Source/Interfaces/AudioProcessor.cpp | head
input.description: Check mini2 float16 storage and wah mode usage

input.command: cd /d/mybot/git/reactor-fw && echo "===== Did reactor fix WAH mode too? =====" && grep -rn "WAH.*MODE\|WAH_MODE\|1000.0f + 0.5f" Appli/Source/Interfaces/AudioProcessor.cpp | head; echo "===== reactor float16 preset storage location ====="; grep -n "float16\|fp16\|__fp16\|f16_\|_f16\|half" Appli/Source/Interfaces/AudioService.cpp | head
input.description: Check if reactor fixed wah and where float16 storage is

input.command: cd /d/mybot/git/spark-mini-ii-fw && echo "===== WAH mode define usage (mini2) =====" && grep -rn "DSP_IDX_WAH_MODE_MANUAL\|DSP_IDX_WAH_MODE_AUTO\|DSP_IDX_WAH_MODE\b\|DSP_IDX_WAH_FILTER_MODE" Source/ | head -20; echo; echo "===== the enum/defines context (AudioProcessor.h top) ====="; sed -n '1,90p' Source/Interfaces/AudioProcessor.h
input.description: Investigate wah mode decode semantics in mini2

input.command: cd /d/mybot/git/spark-mini-ii-fw && echo "===== find DSPLib reverb/wah mode decode source =====" && grep -rln "REVERB.*MODE\|reverbMode\|kReverbMode\|getMode\|modeSelect\|wahMode" --include=*.c --include=*.cpp --include=*.h Lib DSPLib Middlewares 2>/dev/null | head; echo "=== where is DSPLib ? ==="; find . -maxdepth 3 -iname "*.a" 2>/dev/null | grep -i dsp | head; find . -maxdepth 2 -type d -iname
input.description: Locate DSP library and mode decode source

input.command: echo "===== locate DSP headers (mini2) =====" && find . -iname "MultiChannelFx.h" -o -iname "DspModule.h" 2>/dev/null | head; echo "===== reverb mode names / list (mini2) ====="; grep -rin "studio\|chamber\|plate\|hall\|spring\|reverb.*mode\|MODE.*reverb" Source/ --include=*.cpp --include=*.h 2>/dev/null | grep -iv "switch\|stereo\|damping" | head -20
input.description: Locate DSP headers and reverb mode list in mini2

input.command: echo "===== how does App set reverb mode? BleCmdHandler reverb mode path =====" && grep -rn "REVERB_MODE\|reverb.*mode" Source/Interfaces/BleCmdHandler.cpp | head; echo "===== get_fx + DspFxBlock struct (confirm fx_id member) ====="; grep -n "struct DspFxBlock\|DspFxBlock\s*{\|fx_id;\|IFxCommon\|fx_obj" Source/Interfaces/AudioProcessor.h | head
input.description: Check reverb mode BLE path and DspFxBlock struct

input.command: echo "===== DSP lib dir contents =====" && ls Source/Libraries/DSP/ 2>/dev/null | head -40; echo "===== search reverb mode decode in DSP lib ====="; grep -rin "mode" Source/Libraries/DSP/ 2>/dev/null | grep -i "reverb\|0.1\|floor\|round\|* 10\|/ 0.1\|preset" | head -20
input.description: Look for reverb mode decode in DSP lib

input.command: echo "===== is set_dsp_module_param the BLE entry (called by AudioService set_dsp_param)? =====" && grep -rn "set_dsp_module_param\|set_dsp_param" Source/Interfaces/AudioService.cpp | head; echo "===== reactor: confirm same call structure for comparison ====="; cd /d/mybot/git/reactor-fw && grep -n "set_dsp_module_param" Appli/Source/Interfaces/AudioProcessor.cpp | head
input.description: Confirm BLE entry path for reverb mode

input.command: cd /d/mybot/git/spark-mini-ii-fw && echo "=== current branch/status ===" && git branch --show-current && git status -s | head && echo "=== recent history of AudioProcessor.cpp ===" && git log --oneline -5 -- Source/Interfaces/AudioProcessor.cpp && echo "=== develop exists? remote? ===" && git branch -a | grep -i "develop\|main" | head && git remote -v | head -2
input.description: Check mini2 git state and file history

input.command: echo "=== Makefile diff ===" && git diff Makefile | head -40; echo "=== pg-utilities (submodule) diff ===" && git diff Import/pg-utilities | head -20
input.description: Inspect uncommitted changes on current branch

input.command: echo "=== float16 used for preset param values? (CMpParser / CMpParameter) ===" && grep -rn "float16\|f16\|readFloat16\|decodeFloat16\|toFloat16" Import/MsgPack/pgmsgpack/preset/ Import/MsgPack/pgmsgpack/common/float16.* 2>/dev/null | head -20; echo "=== CMpParameter valueArray type ==="; grep -rn "valueArray\|float16\|_value" Import/MsgPack/pgmsgpack/preset/*.h 2>/dev/null | head
input.description: Confirm float16 used for preset param values

input.command: git fetch origin 2>&1 | tail -3 && echo "=== develop head ===" && git log --oneline -1 origin/develop && echo "=== AudioProcessor.cpp on develop matches working? ===" && git diff origin/develop -- Source/Interfaces/AudioProcessor.cpp | head -5
input.description: Fetch origin and check develop state

input.command: echo "=== float16.c signature/purpose ===" && grep -rn "float16\|half\|0x7c00\|exponent\|mantissa\|uint16" Import/MsgPack/pgmsgpack/common/float16.c 2>/dev/null | head -15; echo "=== where float16 decode is called in msgpack read ==="; grep -rln "float16\|Float16\|readF16\|f16" Import/MsgPack/pgmsgpack/ 2>/dev/null | head
input.description: Confirm float16.c is half-precision codec

input.command: echo "=== find float16 files ===" && find . -iname "*float16*" 2>/dev/null | head; echo "=== find CMpParser ==="; find . -iname "CMpParser*" 2>/dev/null | head; echo "=== is Import/MsgPack populated? ==="; ls Import/MsgPack/pgmsgpack/common/ 2>/dev/null | head
input.description: Locate float16 and CMpParser files

input.command: cd /d/mybot/git/_wt/mini2-reverb && echo "=== Import/MsgPack a submodule? ===" && grep -A2 "MsgPack" .gitmodules 2>/dev/null | head; echo "=== Makefile still refs float16.c on develop? ===" && grep -n "float16.c\|CMpParser" Makefile | head; echo "=== AudioProcessor.cpp present ===" && ls -la Source/Interfaces/AudioProcessor.cpp
input.description: Check if MsgPack is submodule and Makefile refs on develop

input.command: echo "===== DIFF =====" && git diff -- Source/Interfaces/AudioProcessor.cpp; echo "===== line-length check (>100) ====="; awk 'length>100{print FILENAME":"NR": "length" chars"}' Source/Interfaces/AudioProcessor.cpp | grep -E ":(65[0-9]|9[0-9][0-9]|100[0-9]):" | head
input.description: Review diff and check line lengths

input.command: echo "=== who calls create_dsp_module? (confirm preset-load path) ===" && grep -rn "create_dsp_module" Source/ | head; echo; echo "=== any OTHER loop applying preset params via setParameter (bypass)? ==="; grep -rn "setParameter\|getParamValue\|paramCnt\|valueArray" Source/Interfaces/AudioProcessor.cpp | grep -v "923\|924\|653\|1009" | head -20; echo; echo "=== confirm DSP_IDX_REVERB_MODE / FX_ID_
input.description: Verify preset-load path and symbol definitions

input.command:
git add Source/Interfaces/AudioProcessor.cpp && git commit -q -F - <<'EOF'
fix: round reverb MODE to remove float16 noise (port RAD-1476)

Reverb MODE is a discrete selector (0.0..0.8 in 0.1 steps) but preset
params travel as float16, so modes that round down (Studio B 0.1,
Chamber 0.2, Hall Medium 0.4, Plate Long 0.8) decode to the preceding
mode after save + reload. Round the MODE value on the t
input.description: Commit reverb fix in worktree

input.command: echo "=== push feature branch explicitly ===" && git push -u origin fix/reverb-mode-float16-precision:fix/reverb-mode-float16-precision 2>&1 | tail -8
input.description: Push feature branch explicitly

input.description: List Jenkins jobs for spark/mini
Inspect SPARK_MINI_2_FW job parameters
